name: Amplitude Analytics MCP Server
what_it_does: Official Amplitude MCP server enabling AI agents to query Amplitude's product analytics — event data, user properties, funnels, cohorts, and dashboards for product insights and data-driven agent workflows.
use_cases: Querying product usage metrics and event counts from analysis agents
Analyzing user funnel conversion rates for product decision agents
Accessing cohort data for personalization agents
Querying user properties and behavior patterns
Retrieving dashboard and chart data for reporting agents
not_for: Teams using Mixpanel, Heap, or other product analytics tools
best_when: An agent needs product analytics insights — usage patterns, funnels, cohort analysis — from an Amplitude-instrumented product.
avoid_when: You're using Mixpanel, Heap, or another product analytics platform.

auth.notes: Amplitude uses API key + secret key pair. Export API requires separate credentials. No scope granularity — key grants project-level access.

pricing.notes: Generous free tier for small products. API access included in all plans. Export API may require higher tier.

known_agent_gotchas: Different APIs (Event, Export, Dashboard) use different auth and rate limits
Data is sampled by default on large datasets — specify no sampling for accuracy
Time zone matters significantly for event queries — always specify timezone
Amplitude's query language (AQL) required for complex analytics
Rate limit (360/hr) hit quickly by analysis agents running multiple queries
Export API has separate auth and much lower rate limits
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Dual key pair auth (API key + secret). No fine-grained scopes. Amplitude contains sensitive behavioral data — treat credentials carefully. SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. No scope granularity on keys — project-level access only. Contains PII behavioral data — rotation and access control critical. SOC 2, HIPAA, ISO 27001.
